description: Style NoteThe stitch detailing and colour splash on this rakishly designed shirt from Provouge adds casual styling to your ensemble, while the fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes for an effortlessly awesome look!Product DetailsRed and navy blue checked shirt with a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid buttoned tabs, navy blue patch on the elbow region, removable hood with tie ups, full buttoned placket, patch pockets on the either sides of the chest with buttoned flaps, branding on the leftpocket and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
